name: Double Chocolate Granita
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, stir together water and sugar until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Bring to boiling over high heat; boil for 1 minute without stirring.
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
4. Chop the semisweet chocolate and stir it into the sugar mixture with cocoa powder, vanilla, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Stir until the chocolate has melted completely.
5. Pour the mixture into a 9x9x2-inch square pan and cover loosely with plastic wrap.
6. Place in the freezer. As the sides freeze, gently stir the mixture toward the middle with a spoon and return it to the freezer.
7. To serve, scoop out with an ice cream scoop. If very frozen solid, let soften for 15 minutes in the refrigerator.
Per 1/2 cup serving: 116 calories; 1 gram protein; 3 grams fat; 24 grams carbohydrates; 12 milligrams sodium; 0 grams cholesterol; 23% of calories from fat.
This recipe is one of my family's favorites. It is low-fat and healthy, but it tastes delicious so none suspect it.
